OpenBiomechanics Pitching Dashboard

Pitch 1097_1 · out-of-sample · predicted 80.7 mph (actual 77.6, error +3.1) · model R²=0.84, RMSE=2.0 mph

Biomechanics glossary

Delivery events & conventions
  • PKH (peak knee height) — The top of the leg lift, when the lead knee reaches its highest point and the pitcher begins moving toward the plate.
  • FC (foot contact) — First touch of the lead foot, defined as 10% bodyweight on the lead force plate.
  • FP (foot plant) — Lead foot fully planted, defined as 100% bodyweight on the lead force plate. The start of the arm-cocking/acceleration phase.
  • MER (maximum external rotation) — Peak shoulder external rotation, a.k.a. 'layback' — the throwing arm is maximally cocked just before it whips forward.
  • BR (ball release) — The instant the ball leaves the hand.
  • MIR (maximum internal rotation) — Peak shoulder internal rotation during follow-through, after release.

Coordinate system. Global (lab) frame: +x points from second base toward home plate, +y points toward first base, +z points up. Joint angles, forces, and moments are reported per the right-hand rule with adjustments so signs match coach/player intuition (righty/lefty symmetry, etc.). Joint forces and moments are internal.

Ground reaction forces. Ground reaction forces: rear plate (FP2) +x = push-off (anterior, toward home); lead plate (FP1/3) +x = braking (posterior); both plates +y = lateral, +z = superior (vertical). Filtered with a 4th-order Butterworth low-pass at 40 Hz.

VariableCategoryUnitsEvent Full explanation
session_pitchIdentifier——Unique identifier for a single pitch (session + pitch number). Used to join the POI metrics, force plates, and C3D file for one delivery.
sessionIdentifier——Unique identifier for a data-collection session (one athlete on one day).
p_throwsIdentifierR/L—Pitcher handedness: 'R' (right-handed) or 'L' (left-handed).
pitch_typeIdentifier——Type of pitch thrown. In this dataset all pitches are 'FF' (four-seam fastball).
pitch_speed_mphIdentifiermphBRRelease speed of the pitch in miles per hour — the target variable the velocity model predicts.
max_shoulder_internal_rotational_veloKinematics – angular velocitydeg/speakPeak shoulder internal-rotation angular velocity. The fastest rotational motion in the throw and the single strongest correlate of velocity; the arm internally rotates explosively from layback (MER) to release.
max_elbow_extension_veloKinematics – angular velocitydeg/speakPeak elbow-extension angular velocity — how fast the elbow straightens as the forearm whips forward into release.
max_torso_rotational_veloKinematics – angular velocitydeg/speakPeak torso axial-rotation (Z) angular velocity — how fast the trunk rotates toward the plate. A key link in the kinetic chain.
max_rotation_hip_shoulder_separationKinematics – joint angledegpeakPeak hip–shoulder separation: the maximum angular difference between the pelvis and the thorax. Greater separation stores more elastic energy (the 'X-factor').
max_elbow_flexionKinematics – joint angledegpeakPeak elbow flexion angle (most bent the elbow gets), typically around arm cocking.
max_shoulder_external_rotationKinematics – joint angledegMERPeak shoulder external rotation ('layback') — how far the forearm lays back behind the arm at maximum cocking. Higher values lengthen the acceleration path.
elbow_flexion_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPElbow flexion angle at foot plant.
elbow_pronation_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPWrist/forearm pronation angle at foot plant.
rotation_hip_shoulder_separation_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPHip–shoulder separation angle at foot plant — how 'coiled' the pitcher is when the front foot lands.
shoulder_horizontal_abduction_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPThrowing-shoulder horizontal abduction at foot plant (how far the arm is swung back behind the chest plane).
shoulder_abduction_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPThrowing-shoulder abduction (elevation of the upper arm away from the torso) at foot plant — relates to arm slot.
shoulder_external_rotation_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPThrowing-shoulder external rotation at foot plant.
lead_knee_extension_angular_velo_fpKinematics – angular velocitydeg/sFPLead-knee extension angular velocity at foot plant — early blocking/bracing of the front leg.
lead_knee_extension_angular_velo_brKinematics – angular velocitydeg/sBRLead-knee extension angular velocity at ball release. A stiff, extending front leg at release transfers energy up the chain.
lead_knee_extension_angular_velo_maxKinematics – angular velocitydeg/speakPeak lead-knee extension angular velocity during the delivery.
torso_anterior_tilt_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPTrunk forward (anterior) flexion at foot plant.
torso_lateral_tilt_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPTrunk lateral (side) flexion at foot plant — glove-side vs throwing-side lean.
torso_rotation_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPTrunk axial rotation at foot plant (how open/closed the chest is).
pelvis_anterior_tilt_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPPelvis anterior/posterior tilt at foot plant.
pelvis_lateral_tilt_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPPelvis lateral tilt (hip hike) at foot plant.
pelvis_rotation_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPPelvis axial rotation at foot plant — how far the hips have opened to the plate when the front foot lands.
max_cog_velo_xKinematics – linear velocitym/speakPeak center-of-gravity velocity toward home plate — overall momentum of the body moving down the mound.
torso_rotation_minKinematics – joint angledegpeakPeak torso counter-rotation angle (most 'closed' the trunk gets) before rotating forward.
max_pelvis_rotational_veloKinematics – angular velocitydeg/speakPeak pelvis axial-rotation angular velocity — the hips lead the trunk in the rotational sequence.
glove_shoulder_horizontal_abduction_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPGlove-side shoulder horizontal abduction at foot plant.
glove_shoulder_abduction_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPGlove-side shoulder abduction at foot plant.
glove_shoulder_external_rotation_fpKinematics – joint angledegFPGlove-side shoulder external rotation at foot plant. The glove arm helps set and stabilize trunk posture.
glove_shoulder_abduction_merKinematics – joint angledegMERGlove-side shoulder abduction at maximum external rotation.
elbow_flexion_merKinematics – joint angledegMERThrowing-elbow flexion angle at maximum external rotation (layback).
torso_anterior_tilt_merKinematics – joint angledegMERTrunk forward flexion at maximum external rotation.
torso_lateral_tilt_merKinematics – joint angledegMERTrunk lateral flexion at maximum external rotation — contralateral tilt raises the release point.
torso_rotation_merKinematics – joint angledegMERTrunk axial rotation at maximum external rotation.
elbow_varus_momentKinetics – joint momentNmpeakPeak elbow varus moment — the internal joint moment resisting valgus stress at the elbow. A primary proxy for UCL (elbow) injury load.
shoulder_internal_rotation_momentKinetics – joint momentNmpeakPeak shoulder internal-rotation moment — internal load at the shoulder during arm acceleration.
torso_anterior_tilt_brKinematics – joint angledegBRTrunk forward flexion at ball release.
torso_lateral_tilt_brKinematics – joint angledegBRTrunk lateral flexion at ball release — strongly tied to release height and arm slot.
torso_rotation_brKinematics – joint angledegBRTrunk axial rotation at ball release (how far the chest has rotated to face the plate).
lead_knee_extension_from_fp_to_brKinematics – joint angledegFP→BRChange in lead-knee extension angle from foot plant to ball release — how much the front leg straightens/braces during acceleration.
cog_velo_pkhKinematics – linear velocitym/sPKHCenter-of-gravity velocity toward home at peak knee height — momentum generated during the leg lift/initial drive.
stride_lengthSpatiotemporal / other% body heightFPStride length as a percentage of body height (distance from the rubber to the lead foot at plant).
stride_angleSpatiotemporal / otherdegFPStride direction relative to straight toward the plate; positive = a cross-body (closed) stride.
arm_slotSpatiotemporal / otherdegBRArm slot — the global forearm projection angle at release that describes how over-the-top vs side-arm the delivery is.
timing_peak_torso_to_peak_pelvis_rot_veloSpatiotemporal / others—Time between peak pelvis angular velocity and peak torso angular velocity — a measure of the rotational sequencing/separation timing.
max_shoulder_horizontal_abductionKinematics – joint angledegpeakPeak throwing-shoulder horizontal abduction ('scap loading') during the delivery.
shoulder_transfer_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy transferred across the throwing shoulder between foot plant and ball release (flow of mechanical energy through the joint).
shoulder_generation_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy generated (positive muscle work) at the throwing shoulder, FP→BR.
shoulder_absorption_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy absorbed (negative work, eccentric) at the throwing shoulder, FP→BR.
elbow_transfer_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy transferred across the throwing elbow, FP→BR.
elbow_generation_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy generated at the throwing elbow, FP→BR.
elbow_absorption_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy absorbed at the throwing elbow, FP→BR.
lead_hip_transfer_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy transferred across the lead hip, FP→BR.
lead_hip_generation_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy generated at the lead hip, FP→BR — the front hip is a major power producer in the block-and-rotate.
lead_hip_absorption_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy absorbed at the lead hip, FP→BR.
lead_knee_transfer_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy transferred across the lead knee, FP→BR.
lead_knee_generation_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy generated at the lead knee, FP→BR.
lead_knee_absorption_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy absorbed at the lead knee, FP→BR — the bracing front leg absorbs large amounts of energy.
rear_hip_transfer_pkh_fpEnergy flowJPKH→FPEnergy transferred across the rear (drive) hip between peak knee height and foot plant.
rear_hip_generation_pkh_fpEnergy flowJPKH→FPEnergy generated at the rear hip, PKH→FP — power from the drive leg.
rear_hip_absorption_pkh_fpEnergy flowJPKH→FPEnergy absorbed at the rear hip, PKH→FP.
rear_knee_transfer_pkh_fpEnergy flowJPKH→FPEnergy transferred across the rear knee, PKH→FP.
rear_knee_generation_pkh_fpEnergy flowJPKH→FPEnergy generated at the rear knee, PKH→FP.
rear_knee_absorption_pkh_fpEnergy flowJPKH→FPEnergy absorbed at the rear knee, PKH→FP.
pelvis_lumbar_transfer_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy transferred out of the pelvis toward the trunk (up the chain), FP→BR.
thorax_distal_transfer_fp_brEnergy flowJFP→BREnergy transferred out of the trunk toward the throwing shoulder, FP→BR.
rear_grf_x_maxGround reaction forceNpeakPeak anterior push-off ground reaction force on the rear (drive) leg — how hard the pitcher drives toward the plate.
rear_grf_y_maxGround reaction forceNpeakPeak lateral push-off ground reaction force on the rear leg.
rear_grf_z_maxGround reaction forceNpeakPeak vertical ground reaction force on the rear leg.
rear_grf_mag_maxGround reaction forceNpeakPeak resultant (magnitude) ground reaction force on the rear leg.
rear_grf_angle_at_maxGround reaction forcedegpeakDirection of the rear ground reaction force vector at the instant of peak magnitude (projection angle).
lead_grf_x_maxGround reaction forceNpeakPeak braking ground reaction force on the lead (stride) leg — how hard the front leg blocks against forward momentum.
lead_grf_y_maxGround reaction forceNpeakPeak lateral braking ground reaction force on the lead leg.
lead_grf_z_maxGround reaction forceNpeakPeak vertical ground reaction force on the lead leg — often several times bodyweight as the front leg braces.
lead_grf_mag_maxGround reaction forceNpeakPeak resultant (magnitude) ground reaction force on the lead leg.
lead_grf_angle_at_maxGround reaction forcedegpeakDirection of the lead ground reaction force vector at the instant of peak magnitude (projection angle).
peak_rfd_rearGround reaction forceN/speakPeak rate of force development on the rear leg — how explosively the drive-leg force is applied.
peak_rfd_leadGround reaction forceN/speakPeak rate of force development on the lead leg — how explosively the front leg loads against the ground during the block.
